name: 1. Quick Catch-up - survival Spanish - A2
description: Beginner and travel survival practice for urgent real-life situations.

name: 2. Starter conversation prototype - A1/A2
description: The original small prototype set for basic conversational answers.

name: Nanny 1 - A2 - 100 exercises
description: Personal conversation practice for emotions, family, parenting, memories, stress, depression, hopes, regrets, and past-tense core verbs.

name: Random conjugation switching - A2/B1
description: High-quality drill for jumping quickly between verb conjugations and object pronouns without reciting tables.

name: Reflexive switchboard - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Switchboard pill translation for reflexive verbs, reflexive pronouns, and se me / se te / se le constructions.

name: Uses of "I was" - A2/B1 - 100 exercises
description: Switchboard pill translation for choosing between fui, era, estuve, and estaba in single-tense I-was sentences.
